subject: Fermi GBM trigger 541402602/180227234 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 541402602/180227234 at 05:36:37.72 UT
on 27 February 2018, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to local particle activity."
